text.message: bro takes a terrible setup, kills my game, and leaves

but at least i beat a monkey rolling a four sided die
we should figure out how do we stop blue

just saying facts man, laugh all you want

and hopefully oj can at least get on board with robbing blue

can trade wood when i produce
